extraction.one_line_summary: ABER-STORY Juan came from nowhere on the left side to win mass sprint after Israeli Academy disrupted Billia Tristina's leadout in final 600m corner.
tactical_patterns: Israeli Academy used 4-rider train final 600m to box MARESCO out, disrupting Billia Tristina leadout for first time.
LOWNDES Jason sacrificed own sprint setting tempo for teammate VAUGHN, revealing Academy prioritizing GC over stage wins.
Repeated breakaway rider CARTIER showed diminishing returns; sprinter teams now ignore sub-3min gaps after 3 stages learning curve.

rider_signals.MARESCO Jakob: negative: boxed in final corner for first time after winning 2 stages, shows vulnerability when leadout disrupted
rider_signals.VAUGHN Jambo: positive: held GC lead despite team working for him in sprint, suggesting climbing legs intact at race midpoint
rider_signals.ABER-STORY Juan: positive: won from left side blind spot while favorites watched each other, Spanish climber with hidden sprint speed
rider_signals.CARTIER Alexis: neutral: third consecutive day in breakaway signals desperation or team has no sprint option
